name: deltanet
description: Single-user social network federating over encrypted email (chatmail) — daemon + web frontend

scripts.setup: cd daemon && pnpm install && cd ../frontend && mise exec -- pnpm install
scripts.build: cd frontend && mise exec -- pnpm build
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && mise exec -- pnpm dev
scripts.test: cd daemon && pnpm test && cd ../frontend && mise exec -- pnpm test
scripts.check: cd daemon && pnpm check && cd ../frontend && mise exec -- pnpm check
